summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 40 job refs; all hydrated refs are open pull requests and no shared canonical should be invented. No merge, fix, raise_pr, low-signal close, or instant close is allowed by the job/fix artifact, so hydrated PRs are kept as independent inventory items. Unhydrated listed refs are blocked for classification because live target kind/state/updated_at are unavailable from the preflight artifact.
